EmailTemplate.name: Annual Meeting Event Notice Two
EmailTemplate.subject: 温馨提示：20日工厂参观及年度营销会议开启 Reminder: VRF Factory visit and 2025 Annual Marketing Meeting start on the 20th
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
温馨提示：工厂参观时间20日9:00-11:30，大巴车于酒店正门9点发车，请提前上车。
无参观安排的领导，大巴车于8:10酒店正门发车，前往国际中心。
2025年度营销会议将于明日14:00在国际中心L2会议室正式开始。请提前15分钟到场签到，着深色商务套装，白色或浅色衬衣，不系领带。
Reminder: VRF Factory visit on the 20th from 9:00 to 11:30. Bus departs at 9:00 from the hotel main entrance. Please be early.
For those not visiting, bus to International Center departs at 8:10 from the hotel main entrance.
2025 Annual Marketing Meeting starts tomorrow at 14:00 in the L2 Meeting Hall. Please arrive 15 min early for check-in. Dress code: Dark business suit, white or light shirt, no tie.
